arts.ttl: ‘Let’s be honest’: Thierry Henry says people keep saying something about Arsenal that’s so ‘unfair’
arts.sum: Arsenal need a new number nine, or at least that’s what people keep saying. Indeed, everyone is talking about how Arsenal need a striker. Paul...

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'EXPECT' key transfer for in-demand star this month
arts.sum: Lewis-Skelly’s absence saw Oleksandr Zinchenko make just his fourth start of the season against Dinamo but the Ukraine international is ‘expected’ to leave the club before the end of the month, according to The Telegraph . Mikel Arteta has turned to Myles Lewis-Skelly to fill in at left-back after injuries to Riccardo Calafiori and Takehiro Tomiyasu but the teenager also suffered a blow against Aston Villa that kept him out of Arsenal’s win over Dinamo this week.

arts.ttl: Club now announce they have signed £76m striker who Arsenal were offered
Nuno Espirito Santo breaks silence on Nottingham Forest 'target' Matheus Cunha amid Arsenal links
arts.sum: Nuno Espirito Santo has refused to be drawn on speculation linking Nottingham Forest with a move for Wolverhampton Wanderers forward Matheus Cunha. As well as Forest, Arsenal, Tottenham, Chelsea and Manchester United have been linked with a move for the former Atletico Madrid and Hertha Berlin frontman, who has scored 10 goals in 21 Premier League games for Wolves this term.

arts.ttl: Havertz lays down Arsenal striker gauntlet to Sesko as Arteta weighs up move
arts.sum: Look under any social media post of a reasonable size covering the goals or assists that Havertz has logged in the past few days and without fail there will be a point of view that truly believes the club’s transfer strategy will have suddenly changed. Kai Havertz has reached 14 goals in 30 matches this season, 22 games faster than he managed during the previous campaign.
As well covering the key figures on goals, assists and appearances, our in-depth package also lays bare passing accuracy, tackle success rate and even distance covered by the entire squad.

arts.ttl: Premier League confirm controversial Arsenal vs Wolves referee decision amid Mikel Arteta fury
arts.sum: The Premier League have announced the match officials set to oversee Arsenal's clash away at Wolves this weekend. "To be fair, it’s the first time I’ve seen a red card like this in 18 years that I’ve been in this league," Arteta said after the game.

arts.ttl: Edu left Arsenal £30m transfer parting gift as Mikel Arteta gets dream bargain signing
arts.sum: Edu 'completed the groundwork' on a proposed £30million transfer for Brazilian talent Igor Jesus before leaving his role as Arsenal sporting director in November . According to transfer expert Ben Jacobs, speaking on Curtis Shaw TV, Edu did the groundwork on a potential deal for Jesus before leaving Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Arsenal defender 'agrees' summer return to boyhood club
arts.sum: Arsenal left-back Kieran Tierney is set to pen a pre-contract agreement which will take him back to Celtic on a free transfer this summer.
